characters.name: 2Morrow
characters.description: 2MorrowInformationSpeciesHumansNationalityNinjagoAffiliationForbidden FiveEnemiesEmpress BeatrixFoundedBefore theLiberation of ImperiumStatusAliveProfessionsMusiciansFirst appearance"Face the Music!"2Morrowis a music duo based onMorroand one of themusic groupsthatEmpress Beatrixbanned fromImperium. At some point, along with the other four bands, 2Morrow was banned fromImperiumbyEmpress Beatrix, after which these five groups became known as the "Forbidden Five." 2Morrow took a concert inNinjago City.

characters.name: Ace
characters.description: AceInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAffiliationPaperboysHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoOccupationPaperboyStatusAliveFirst appearance"The News Never Sleeps!"Latest appearance"Roots"Voiced byKelly MetzgerCole Howard(Episode 177)Aceis apaperboyinNinjago City. Ace was one of the three paperboys that noticeNelsonwhen he first arrived at thenewspaper warehouse. Ace, Sammy, and a girl was watching Leroy playPrime Empire. They soon decided to leave because Leroy was playing for a long time.

characters.name: Acid monster (Land of Monsters)
characters.description: Acid monsterInformationSpeciesMonsterHabitatLand of MonstersStatusAliveFirst appearance"Dying to Live" (flashback)Theacid monster[1]is a two-headed dinosaur-likemonsterfrom theLand of Monsters. WhenBeatrixwas transported to theLand of Monstersfollowing theMergeQuake Storm, she encountered the acid monster among many other atrocious monsters and had to evade the acid it spit.

characters.description: Acid monsterInformationSpeciesMonsterHabitatLand of MonstersStatusAliveFirst appearance"Dying to Live" (flashback)Theacid monster[1]is a two-headed dinosaur-likemonsterfrom theLand of Monsters. WhenBeatrixwas transported to theLand of Monstersfollowing theMergeQuake Storm, she encountered the acid monster among many other atrocious monsters and had to evade the acid it spit.

characters.name: Acid Monsters
characters.description: Acid MonstersInformationSpeciesElemental MonstersAffiliationElemental MonstersEnemiesSource Dragon acolytesAconaNinjaEuphrasiaArc Dragon of LifeImperiansElementWater(corrupted)StatusExistent (when manifested)First appearanceNinjago: The Quest(non-canon)71854 Cole's Mission MechLatest appearance"Birthright"71869 Land BountyAcid Monstersare a type ofsnake-likeElemental Monstersthat embody a corrupted version ofWater. After theSource DragonsofFocus,Life, andStrengthleft theCouncil of Sources, two Elemental Monsters conjured by theWeapon of Desolationemerged from theSanctuary of the Seven Sources, one of which was an Acid Monster, which was created when the disruptedSource Energymingled with the water pooled at the altar, transforming it into a corrosive acid. As the Acid Monster took form, it was soon joined by anEarth Monster, and together, they attacked twoSource Dragon acolytesas theChief Loyalistwatched. Eventually, the Acid and Earth Monsters attacked a fewAcona. However,Lloyd,Arin, andEuphrasiaarrived just in time. As the Acid Monster unleashed a torrent of acid towards Arin, he swiftly countered with hisSpinjitzu, successfully deflecting the attack. However, the Acid Monster quickly turned its attention back to the Acona, prompting Euphrasia to leap into action and protect them. Meanwhile, as the Acid and Earth Monsters closed in on Lloyd, Arin attempted to useObject Spinjitzuby hurling a stick infused with his Spinjitzu energy at the Acid Monster, but the creature's acidic belly dissolved the stick upon contact. Euphrasia also tried to shoot arrows at the Acid Monster, only to see them disintegrate as they struck. After the Earth Monster immobilized Lloyd, the Acid Monster joined it in preparing to attack Arin and Euphrasia. However, after being fueled byLifefrom aTree of Life, Lloyd broke free. This allowed both him and Euphrasia to regain control of theirElemental Powers. Euphrasia then unleashed herWindabilities on the Acid Monster, ultimately defeating it and reducing it to its energy state.

Meanwhile, as the Acid and Earth Monsters closed in on Lloyd, Arin attempted to useObject Spinjitzuby hurling a stick infused with his Spinjitzu energy at the Acid Monster, but the creature's acidic belly dissolved the stick upon contact. Euphrasia also tried to shoot arrows at the Acid Monster, only to see them disintegrate as they struck. After the Earth Monster immobilized Lloyd, the Acid Monster joined it in preparing to attack Arin and Euphrasia. However, after being fueled byLifefrom aTree of Life, Lloyd broke free. This allowed both him and Euphrasia to regain control of theirElemental Powers. Euphrasia then unleashed herWindabilities on the Acid Monster, ultimately defeating it and reducing it to its energy state.

characters.name: Acidicus
characters.description: AcidicusInformationSpeciesVenomariGenderMaleAffiliationSerpentineHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoOccupationGeneral of theVenomariLibrarian of theSerpentine's libraryWeapon of choiceVenomari Staff(formerly)Dagger(briefly)StatusAliveFirst appearance"Can of Worms"9450 Epic Dragon BattleLatest appearanceStrike of the Serpentine(flashback)Voiced byPaul DobsonJohn Novak(episode 11)Acidicusis theSerpentinegeneral of theVenomaritribe and a current librarian of theSerpentine's library. Near the end of theSerpentine Wars, Acidicus and the other Venomari had taken a handful of civilians hostage in theToxic Bogs. It was there thatMayafound them and used aSacred Fluteto lock Acidicus and the other Venomari in theirtomb.[1] Acidicus and his tribe being locked in theVenomari Tomb Acidicus is a very proud general of his tribe. He once fought for this position and does not intend to give it up easily, as he told Pythor. After being locked in thetomb of the Stone Army, Acidicus changed completely and began to pursue his hobby, books. At first, this activity only led him to tell Serpentine stories and legends, and later even to open his ownlibrary, where he became a librarian.

characters.name: Acronix
characters.description: AcronixInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAffiliationElemental Alliance(formerly)Time TwinsVermillionHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoOccupationCriminalCo-leader of theVermillionWeapon of choiceBo staff(formerly)KatanasTime BladesDagger(formerly)ElementTime(ForwardandSlow-Mo, formerly)StatusUnknownFamilyUnnamed(mother)Krux(brother)First appearanceDark Island Trilogy, Part 3(vision)70626 Dawn of Iron DoomLatest appearanceStrike of the Serpentine(flashback)71861 The Old TownVoiced byIan HanlinAcronixis one of thetwocurrent (albeit powerless)Elemental MastersofTime. He is the younger twin brother ofKrux. Once a proud Elemental Master who helped win theSerpentine War, Acronix and his brother betrayed theElemental Alliancedue to them believing that theirElemental Powerwas the strongest and entitling them to ruleNinjago. In response, their former allies Ray and Maya, under Wu's orders, forged aset of weaponsthat absorbed the twins' element. Acronix andKruxwere lost in thetemporal vortex, butKruxmanaged to escape and planned on how they would rule Ninjago by using the Vermillion as foot soldiers and the Time Blades to go back in time to defeat their former allies. For four decades, Acronix remained in the temporal vortex and didn't age during that time. Upon his return at theMonastery of Spinjitzu, he was confronted byWu, who had been waiting for him. Acronix was swiftly beaten byWu, but by using theForward Time Blade, Wu began to rapidly age. Acronix reunited with his brother, who had bred an army ofVermillionsnakes since his escape. After capturingCyrus Borg, they began building atime-travelingweapon, theIron Doom, so they can travel into the past and give themselves a better future. Despite his brother's animosity towards technology, Acronix greatly enjoyed it, even gotten aBorgPadandBorgWatch. The twins disagree constantly about technology, but nevertheless love each other and strive towards their goal together. Without a master to guide them, the ninja fought against Acronix and Krux numerous times but were unable to gain the upper hand. Ultimately, the Iron Doom was completed, and Acronix traveled back in time to defeat the Elemental Masters.KaiandNyamade a final effort to thwart their plans by aiding the Elemental Masters. When the Iron Doom tried traveling into the future, Wu removed the Reversal Time Blade from the weapon, causing it to spiral out of control. Though Kai and Nya escaped, Acronix was lost in the Temporal Vortex along with his brother and their greatest enemy. Unlike his calculated brother, Acronix is a young, arrogant warrior and very excitable with a fascination for modern technology after having been sent forty years into the present. While he may give off a clueless air, he is a very skilled warrior who is very confident in his abilities and lives to fight all the time. He is quite ruthless as he didn't hesitate to batter Wu and insult him for being an old man since he last saw him. Acronix is also very impatient and short-tempered in
characters.personality_section: Unlike his calculated brother, Acronix is a young, arrogant warrior and very excitable with a fascination for modern technology after having been sent forty years into the present. While he may give off a clueless air, he is a very skilled warrior who is very confident in his abilities and lives to fight all the time. He is quite ruthless as he didn't hesitate to batter Wu and insult him for being an old man since he last saw him. Acronix is also very impatient and short-tempered in nature, and would rather prefer the use of his modern technology rather than Krux's old-fashioned ways. It appearsKruxis the only person he cares about as he went to visit him and reconnected with him by hugging him in their reunion. He also ceased his battle with Wu and went to his brother's aid when Nya and Kai overwhelmed him. He greatly cares for and respects Krux, calling him "Brother" instead of his first name, and he never disobeys him despite their differences. According to Krux, Acronix has a habit of making up sayings as wisdom, which the former hates. After returning to Ninjago and discovering the technology of the present era, he began adopting modern language to his otherwise formal speech.

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: AdamInformationSpeciesGiant spiderAffiliationGiant spiders(formerly)UpplyThe Resistance(formerly)HabitatShintaro MountainGenderMaleStatusAliveFirst appearance"The Real Fall"Latest appearance"Roots"Adamis agiant spiderwho accompaniesPlundar, along with the other members of theUpply. Adam met the Lowly as a young spiderling when they were searching for theSkull of Hazza D'ur, along with many other spiders.Funguswas able to freeze all of the spiders but him. Taking an interest in the trio, Adam accompanied them on their quest without them realizing they were being followed, and he almost crushed them by accidentally setting off a trap. Once they obtained the skull, they began to head back toVangelis, with Adam in tow. Once they arrived back in theKingdom of Shintarowith the skull presented to Vangelis, the King changed his mind and dropped Adam and the rest of the Lowly down the mountain when they disapproved.[1]

characters.name: Adara
characters.description: AdaraInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAffiliationOrder of FelisHomeworld/ HomelandNinjago(formerly)Departed Realm(formerly)OccupationProtector of theCat-Eye JewelWeapon of choiceBo staffStatusDeceasedFirst appearanceThe Curse of the Cat-Eye Jewel(flashback)Adarawas a member of theOrder of Felis. Adara was training with the otherJewel Guardianswhen she spotsDillonandWu. After learning aboutGarmadon's whereabouts, she goes off to prepare an army forNineko's arrival. When Dillon and Wu arrive at the mountain, she informs them that Nineko and Garmadon are on their way. As soon as she says that, they arrived and she and warriors engaged in battle. Sometime later, she and Dillon attacked Garmadon to give Wu time to bring theCat-Eye Jewelup the mountain. Years later, she and Dillon broughtNineko's umbrellato Wu.

characters.name: Admin Droid
characters.description: Admin DroidInformationSpeciesNPC(formerly)AndroidHomeworld/ HomelandPrime EmpireStatusAliveFirst appearanceOne Step Forward, Two Steps BackLatest appearanceWisdom(illusion)Voiced byMichael AdamthwaiteTheAdmin Droid[1]is anandroidthat formerly worked inPrime Empirewhen he was anNPC. Theninjaapproached the Admin Droid after it gave a receipt and instructions to a healing station to a member of theWhack Rats. AfterKaiasks of the existence of a "Speedway 500", it immediately replies "no". The Admin Droid informs the ninja that the entry fee will be taken from their player accounts, 200creditsper person and 1000 credits in total. When theRed Visorsbegin surrounding the ninja, the Admin Droid can be seen shuffling away from their sight.

characters.name: Administration Agents
characters.description: Administration AgentsInformationLeader(s)The AdministratorMembersRoderick AllenSsssSsss UnderwoodPrentisDenholtKaritEthaDonovanLeopoldRamirez (Ninjago Magazine)FarbissinaSpitta[1]DebraCarl BRamirezLead AgentNindroid WarriorsMunceMerlopiansNindroid SentriesPast membersJay WalkerBonnie(undercover)NationalityThe AdministrationEnemiesNinjaAlfonzo Frohicky[2]GandalariaBonzleJiroDrixSpectral DragoniansFreebootersLoyalistsElementLightning(Jay)FoundedBeforethe MergeBase of operationsThe AdministrationProfessionsAgentsFirst appearance"They Call It Doom"71861 The Old TownLatest appearance"Just Under the Surface"TheAdministration Agentsare a covert group of bureaucratic operatives responsible for the management and operation ofthe Administration. At an unknown point in time,The Administratorfounded theAdministrationand recruited the administration agents. During a examination of theMother Garden'slegality,DenholtandKaritunexpectedly encounteredRapton, leading to the discovery of thepink Dragon Core. They swiftly incapacitated Rapton using a taser and promptly retrieved the Dragon Core. With the core in their possession, they returned tothe Administration.

characters.name: Adventure-Ready Woman
characters.description: Adventure-Ready WomanInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoWeapon of choiceKatana(briefly)StatusAliveFirst appearance"The Meaning of Victory"Latest appearance"Wisdom"Voiced byKathleen BarrTheAdventure-Ready Womanis a gamer who was formerly trapped inPrime Empire. NOTE: Most of the Adventure-Ready Women were used multiple times in group shots. As such, any notable appearances of an Adventure-Ready Woman will be categorized here for convenience. Like all the gamers fromNinjago, the Adventure-Ready Woman playedPrime Empireand reached level thirteen, ending up being trapped in the game as a result.

characters.name: Akita
characters.description: AkitaHumanoidWolfInformationSpeciesFormlingGenderFemaleAffiliationFormlingsThe Resistance(formerly)Homeworld/ HomelandNever-RealmWeapon of choiceDaggerStatusAliveFamilyKataru(brother)First appearance"The Never-Realm" (voice)70671 Lloyd's JourneyLatest appearance"Monster Mountain"71767 Ninja Dojo Temple(pictured)Voiced byTabitha St. GermainAkita(formerly nicknamedRedbyLloyd) is aFormlingwho lives in theNever-Realm, and the younger twin sister ofKataru. She has the ability tomorphbetween the form of a three-tailedwolfand ahuman. She was the only Formling aside from her brother that hadn't beenfrozenbyBoreal. She confronted theIce Emperorintending tokillhim for revenge (unbeknown to her that it was in fact Zane who had been brainwashed and manipulated byVex). However, he froze her. Afterward, Vex accidentally managed to free Zane from the former's manipulation, and Akita thawed along with the rest of her people. Following Vex's defeat, she was reunited with her brother and her people were freed from their imprisonment as peace returned to theNever-Realm. Originally, she was insecure about herself because she feared that she would not be able to achieve her form. However, encouragement from her brother and her people put aside those worries. After achieving her form, she was greatly happy and wasted no time using it. She was very close to her brotherKataruand they would spend most of their time together. She was later devastated to witness his supposed death and sought to avenge him. However, she was happy to see that he survived and shared a warm embrace with him. Having lost her people and being alone for decades, Akita became vengeful and sought after the men responsible. She was determined to get her revenge and even threatened Lloyd should he interfere. Despite this, Akita is shown to be very loyal to her friends. Especially when she sticks with Lloyd for the entire journey to the Castle of Ice. Even though their goals differ, Akita might have had empathy for Lloyd when she asked him what he will do after saving Zane. And when Lloyd was frozen in place during the confrontation with Zane, she desperately tries to save him. She is also hopeful as she believes that someone will stand up against the Ice Emperor one day and was pleased she was right. Also, when her brother comforted her of Lloyd's departure, she remained confident of seeing Lloyd again, just not for a very long time.

She is also hopeful as she believes that someone will stand up against the Ice Emperor one day and was pleased she was right. Also, when her brother comforted her of Lloyd's departure, she remained confident of seeing Lloyd again, just not for a very long time.

characters.name: Akita
characters.description: AkitaHumanoidWolfInformationSpeciesFormlingGenderFemaleAffiliationFormlingsThe Resistance(formerly)Homeworld/ HomelandNever-RealmWeapon of choiceDaggerStatusAliveFamilyKataru(brother)First appearance"The Never-Realm" (voice)70671 Lloyd's JourneyLatest appearance"Monster Mountain"71767 Ninja Dojo Temple(pictured)Voiced byTabitha St. GermainAkita(formerly nicknamedRedbyLloyd) is aFormlingwho lives in theNever-Realm, and the younger twin sister ofKataru. She has the ability tomorphbetween the form of a three-tailedwolfand ahuman. She was the only Formling aside from her brother that hadn't beenfrozenbyBoreal. She confronted theIce Emperorintending tokillhim for revenge (unbeknown to her that it was in fact Zane who had been brainwashed and manipulated byVex). However, he froze her. Afterward, Vex accidentally managed to free Zane from the former's manipulation, and Akita thawed along with the rest of her people. Following Vex's defeat, she was reunited with her brother and her people were freed from their imprisonment as peace returned to theNever-Realm. Originally, she was insecure about herself because she feared that she would not be able to achieve her form. However, encouragement from her brother and her people put aside those worries. After achieving her form, she was greatly happy and wasted no time using it. She was very close to her brotherKataruand they would spend most of their time together. She was later devastated to witness his supposed death and sought to avenge him. However, she was happy to see that he survived and shared a warm embrace with him. Having lost her people and being alone for decades, Akita became vengeful and sought after the men responsible. She was determined to get her revenge and even threatened Lloyd should he interfere. Despite this, Akita is shown to be very loyal to her friends. Especially when she sticks with Lloyd for the entire journey to the Castle of Ice. Even though their goals differ, Akita might have had empathy for Lloyd when she asked him what he will do after saving Zane. And when Lloyd was frozen in place during the confrontation with Zane, she desperately tries to save him. She is also hopeful as she believes that someone will stand up against the Ice Emperor one day and was pleased she was right. Also, when her brother comforted her of Lloyd's departure, she remained confident of seeing Lloyd again, just not for a very long time.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertInformationSpeciesChimpanzeeGenderMaleStatusUnknownFirst appearance"I Just Had the Most Peculiar Dream" (dream)Voiced byClay St. ThomasAlbertis the pilot ofMr. Oswald's Spacebus. Zane recounted a vivid dream in which he encountered Albert, the driver of Mr. Oz's Spacebus, who was fleeing from the nightmare creatures. During the dream, Albert cautioned Zane to fasten his seatbelt, and later admonished him for entering the cockpit. Upon awakening, Zane shared the details of his dream with the ninja, noting the peculiarity of it since Albert could talk.

characters.description: AlbertInformationSpeciesChimpanzeeGenderMaleStatusUnknownFirst appearance"I Just Had the Most Peculiar Dream" (dream)Voiced byClay St. ThomasAlbertis the pilot ofMr. Oswald's Spacebus. characters.name: Alfonzo Frohicky
characters.description: Alfonzo FrohickyInformationSpeciesAnthropomorphicfrogGenderMaleAffiliationFrog TribeMonastery of SpinjitzuHomeworld/ HomelandWyldness[1]OccupationEvent organizerAssistant Keeper of theMonastery of SpinjitzuStatusAliveFamilyUnnamed(grandmother)Unnamed(mother)Croakwart(aunt)First appearance"The Merge: Part 1"Latest appearance"Birthright"Voiced byAndrew McNeeMr. Alfonzo Elias Frohicky[2]is an anthropomorphicfrogfrom theWyldness[1]that used to live in theCrossroadsand organized many events, including races, festivals and competitions. His friends from the Crossroads,ArinandSoraoffered for him to stay at theMonastery of Spinjitzuto helpLloydmaintain it as an Assistant Monastery Keeper. Despite having troubles with this job at first, he became fond of it and decided to stay and help theninjain this way. Long ago, as a tadpole, Alfonzo learned of numerous tales about theForbidden Fivefrom hishome realm[3]and theninjafromNinjago.[4]At some point in his life, Alfonzo learned family recipes from hismother,grandmotherandaunt. Following the unification of allrealmsbythe Merge, Alfonzo found himself residing in theCrossroads, whether due to the loss of his original home or a deliberate decision. Within the Crossroads, Alfonzo was an organizer of many events like races, contests or festivals and formed a close bond withArinandSora, becoming steadfast friends.[5] Mr. Frohicky worked at the entry booth for theMech Master 5000, serving as the event's manager. When Arin and Sora registered to enter, Arin offered him an appleberry pie in lieu of money for their entry fee. Although Mr. Frohicky declined at first, a quick whiff of the pie was more than enough to change his mind. Alfonzo Frohicky is a very energetic and hardworking frog man from theWyldness. He has a great weakness for various foods, and is even willing to bend the rules for those who offer him food. At the request ofArinandSora, he was willing to come to work at theMonastery of Spinjitzuas an Assistant Keeper without objection. However, since he felt that he was not good enough for the job, he wanted to leave, but was convinced byZane. He built a very good relationship with this ninja and decided to help him in various ways, including offering him food, plush toys, but also ice, since he thought Zane needed it. He is very kind, helpful, and responsible at his task at the Monastery. He is always very helpful to guests of the monastery, often preparing food or drink for them. Although of a peaceful nature and rather coward, he showed great bravery whenRasattacked the monastery in the ninja's absence, standing up to him while he is a very a dangerous opponent. Wishing to be as brave as the ninja, he first threw a bowl of soup at the Tiger's face and later tried to attack him with his extendable tongue.

characters.name: Alfonzo Frohicky's grandmother
characters.description: Alfonzo Frohicky's grandmotherInformationSpeciesAnthropomorphicfrogGenderFemaleAffiliationFrog TribeHomeworld/ HomelandWyldness[1]StatusUnknownFamilyUnnamed(daughter or daughter-in-law)Croakwart(daughter or extended in-law)Alfonzo Frohicky(grandson)First appearance"Wyldly Inappropriate" (mentioned)Latest appearance"The Whispering Wood" (mentioned)Anunnamed anthropomorphicfrogis the grandmother ofAlfonzo Frohicky. Mr. Frohicky used his grandmother's recipe when making tea forZane.

characters.name: Alfonzo Frohicky's grandmother
characters.description: Alfonzo Frohicky's grandmotherInformationSpeciesAnthropomorphicfrogGenderFemaleAffiliationFrog TribeHomeworld/ HomelandWyldness[1]StatusUnknownFamilyUnnamed(daughter or daughter-in-law)Croakwart(daughter or extended in-law)Alfonzo Frohicky(grandson)First appearance"Wyldly Inappropriate" (mentioned)Latest appearance"The Whispering Wood" (mentioned)Anunnamed anthropomorphicfrogis the grandmother ofAlfonzo Frohicky. characters.name: Alfonzo Frohicky's mother
characters.description: Alfonzo Frohicky's motherInformationSpeciesAnthropomorphicfrogGenderFemaleAffiliationFrog TribeHomeworld/ HomelandWyldness[1]StatusUnknownFamilyUnnamed(mother or mother-in-law)Alfonzo Frohicky(son)Croakwart(sister or sister-in-law)First appearance"The Last Djinn" (mentioned)Latest appearance"Shattered Dreams" (mentioned)Anunnamed anthropomorphicfrogis the mother ofAlfonzo Frohicky. Alfonzo Frohicky brought Zane a bucket of ice, under the impression that Zane, as the Elemental Master ofIce, needed ice to ensure his powers over it would be replenished. After Zane informed Frohicky that he could generate it at will and kindly explained that was not how his powers worked, Frohicky walked off in embarrassment, muttering to himself that his mother was right about him being a terrible assistant keeper of the monastery. Alfonzo Frohicky brought Zane a cup offetid swamp tea, stating that it had been made according to his mother's recipe.

characters.name: Algae farmers
characters.description: Algae farmersInformationMembersDaleAffiliationNinjaOcean gangEnemiesCrab monsterOcean gang(formerly)FedulianDoramaDragonian TrackersRoxFoundedBeforethe MergeBase of operationsTheir villageFirst appearance"Gangs of the Sea"Latest appearance"The Screaming Earth" (flashback)Thealgae farmersare farmers from arealmparallel toNinjago. The algae farmers were known for their tranquil way of life in their village. However, after the Merge, they found themselves encountering various inhabitants from different realms. Among these encounters was agangofMerlopians. Controlled by thecrab monster, the ocean gang launched an attack on the algae farmers. Overwhelmed by the aggression, the farmers were forced to retreat to a small section of their village, while the ocean gang and the crab monster seized control of the remaining areas. Stranded aboard their section of village, the farmers drifted aimlessly for a period of time, slowly depleting their reserves of food and supplies as they became increasingly desperate to escape or drift near land. One day, the farmers' piece of village would be visited by a damaged andadrift ship, carryingtwoninjaonboard. As the farmers eagerly greeted the new arrivals, the one in green asked if anyone here would be able to repair their ship's engines. In response, three of the farmers led their visitors toDale, who was constructing a makeshift boat out of a bathtub. Dale explained their plight to the ninja, who then offered to help train the farmers to retake their village from the Ocean gang.

characters.description: AlguInformationSpeciesSkeletonGenderMaleAffiliationGreenbone WarriorsElemental MastersHomeworld/ HomelandUnderworldElementFigmentSound(briefly)StatusUndeadFirst appearance"Enter the City of Temples"Latest appearance"Elements of Betrayal"Algu[1]is aGreenbone Warriorand the currentElemental MasterofFigmentwho was a competitor in theTournament of the Sources, alongside the other Elemental Masters of his generation. At some point in time, Algu was granted thepowerofFigment. Algu was at theGames PlazawhenRobypresents theCity of Templesto theninja.

characters.name: Anacondrai
characters.description: AnacondraiInformationLeader(s)Anacondrai generals(formerly; deceased)ArcturusPythor P. Chumsworth(informal)MembersAnacondrai serpent(deceased)StrikePythor's mother(deceased)Past membersAnacondrai CultistsGarmadonAffiliationSerpentineElementAmber(Skylor)Destruction(Garmadon)Darkness(Pythor; formerly)StatusNear-extinctionFirst appearance"Never Trust a Snake"9449 Ultra Sonic RaiderLatest appearanceStrike of the Serpentine71775 Nya's Samurai X MECHTheAnacondraiwere one of the knownSerpentinetribes living inNinjagoand were the most powerful, fastest, dangerous, and feared of all Serpentine, acting as the fiercest warriors of their time under the leadership ofGeneral Arcturus.  During theSerpentine War, the Anacondrai led theirkindin the battle against thepeople of Ninjago.Master Chenplayed a part in fueling the conflict and driving both sides against each other. After theElemental Masterswon the war, the Anacondrai were sealed away in alarge tombin theSea of Sand, while Arcturus and his generals were banished to theCursed Realm.

characters.name: Anacondrai Cultists
characters.description: Anacondrai CultistsInformationLeader(s)Master ChenMembersClouseZuguEyezorKapauChopeSlevenKraitPast membersSkylorLloyd(undercover)Cole(undercover)Jay(undercover)Kai(undercover)NationalityChen's IslandEnemiesNinjaSons of the First Spinjitzu MasterElemental MastersSerpentineElementAmber(Skylor)Energy(Lloyd)Earth(Cole)Lightning(Jay)Fire(Kai)FoundedAfter theSerpentine WarDissolvedGhost invasionBase of operationsChen's Island(formerly)Chen's camp(formerly)StatusDeceased(exceptClouseandSkylor)First appearance"The Invitation"70745 Anacondrai CrusherLatest appearance"Snake Fake News" (non-canon)112112 Jay vs. EyezorTheAnacondrai Cultists[1](also known as theAnacondrai warriors[2][3][4][5]or theAnacondrai Cult[1]) are a loyal circle of followers led by the notoriousMaster Chenwho worshipped theAnacondraitribe. Following his banishment to asecluded island, Chen began building up his criminal empire, which consisted of a cult of Anacondrai worshippers. The cultists' primary goal was to steal the powers of theElemental Masters, which they would use to perform a spell that would transform them into Anacondrai. Despite their success in doing so, they needed the essence of a true Anacondrai to complete the spell; otherwise, they would return back to theirhumanforms. The cultists capturedPythor, the last surviving Anacondrai, and used his sweat to complete the spell, officially becomingfake Anacondrai. The cultists invadedNinjagoand staged a final battle against the Elemental Masters and their allies at theCorridor of Elders. As the battle waged on, Chen's former pupil,Garmadon, sacrificed himself, freeing the spirits of the Anacondrai generals who cursed the Anacondrai cultists and banished them to theCursed Realm.

characters.description: Anacondrai CultistsInformationLeader(s)Master ChenMembersClouseZuguEyezorKapauChopeSlevenKraitPast membersSkylorLloyd(undercover)Cole(undercover)Jay(undercover)Kai(undercover)NationalityChen's IslandEnemiesNinjaSons of the First Spinjitzu MasterElemental MastersSerpentineElementAmber(Skylor)Energy(Lloyd)Earth(Cole)Lightning(Jay)Fire(Kai)FoundedAfter theSerpentine WarDissolvedGhost invasionBase of operationsChen's Island(formerly)Chen's camp(formerly)StatusDeceased(exceptClouseandSkylor)First appearance"The Invitation"70745 Anacondrai CrusherLatest appearance"Snake Fake News" (non-canon)112112 Jay vs. EyezorTheAnacondrai Cultists[1](also known as theAnacondrai warriors[2][3][4][5]or theAnacondrai Cult[1]) are a loyal circle of followers led by the notoriousMaster Chenwho worshipped theAnacondraitribe. Following his banishment to asecluded island, Chen began building up his criminal empire, which consisted of a cult of Anacondrai worshippers. The cultists capturedPythor, the last surviving Anacondrai, and used his sweat to complete the spell, officially becomingfake Anacondrai. The cultists invadedNinjagoand staged a final battle against the Elemental Masters and their allies at theCorridor of Elders. As the battle waged on, Chen's former pupil,Garmadon, sacrificed himself, freeing the spirits of the Anacondrai generals who cursed the Anacondrai cultists and banished them to theCursed Realm.

characters.name: Anacondrai generals
characters.description: Anacondrai generalsInformationMembersArcturusNationalityNinjagoAffiliationSerpentineEnemiesElemental AllianceAnacondrai CultistsDissolvedAfter theSerpentine WarStatusDeceasedFirst appearance"Spellbound" (flashback)Latest appearanceStrike of the SerpentineTheAnacondrai generalswere the leaders of theAnacondraiand theSerpentineas a whole during theSerpentine War. They led the Anacondrai and theSerpentineinto battle, thus starting theFirst Serpentine Warwhen they heard fromChenandClousethehumansare planning to attack them. When theElemental Alliancedefeated the Serpentine and banished them into tombs using flutes, the Anacondrai generals includingArcturuswere put on trial for their atrocities and war crimes. Afterwards were banished to theCursed RealmbyGarmadon. After Chen started theSecond Serpentine War, Garmadon knew the only way to stop them was to unleash the spirits of the Anacondrai generals by sacrificing himself into the Cursed Realm. Once completed, the generals were freed and began helping the people by cursing Chen'simposter Anacondrai Army.

characters.name: Anacondrai serpents
characters.description: Anacondrai serpentsInformationHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoHabitatMaze of tunnelsStatusExtinctFirst appearance"Only One Can Remain"Latest appearanceStrike of the Serpentine(flashback)Anacondrai serpents[1]were giantserpentsserving in theSerpentine Warwith one surviving as the pet ofClouse. The latter inhabited thecavesbelowChen's Islandthat lead to the undergroundnoodle factoryand the jail cells. The Anacondrai serpents would help theSerpentinecaptureJamanakai Village. During the battle, one attackedLeviand swallowed him.[2][3] After the battle inJamanakai Village,Dusk,RayandMayatied its mouth and brought it to theElemental Alliance's camp. While there, they forced it to regurgitate Levi out of its mouth with the help of someElemental Masters.[3]

characters.name: Anacondrai serpents
characters.description: Anacondrai serpentsInformationHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoHabitatMaze of tunnelsStatusExtinctFirst appearance"Only One Can Remain"Latest appearanceStrike of the Serpentine(flashback)Anacondrai serpents[1]were giantserpentsserving in theSerpentine Warwith one surviving as the pet ofClouse. The latter inhabited thecavesbelowChen's Islandthat lead to the undergroundnoodle factoryand the jail cells. The Anacondrai serpents would help theSerpentinecaptureJamanakai Village. During the battle, one attackedLeviand swallowed him.[2][3] After the battle inJamanakai Village,Dusk,RayandMayatied its mouth and brought it to theElemental Alliance's camp. While there, they forced it to regurgitate Levi out of its mouth with the help of someElemental Masters.[3]

characters.name: Andrea Thomson
characters.description: Andrea ThomsonInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAffiliationNinjago City CouncilHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoOccupationCouncilorStatusAliveFirst appearance"Snaketastrophy"Latest appearance"A Lesson in Anger"Voiced byTabitha St. GermainCity Councilwoman Andrea Thomsonis a councilwoman ofNinjago City. WhenDan Vaapitdecided to do a panel discussion afterGayle GossipandVinnywere captured byAspheeraand asked her andMay Robsenabout their thoughts on "Snaketastrophy," she said that thePyro Vipersattack onNinjago Cityis dangerous for their local neighborhoods, and her counterpoint agreed, which pleased her. Andrea attended MayorUlysses Trustable's press conference about the latest invasion by theCrystal army, asking if he had a plan for the "floating island of doom" that hovered above the invaders. When theNew Ninjafailed to stop the Crystal Army, Andrea ran for her life alongside the rest of those in attendance.

characters.name: Andrea Thomson
characters.description: Andrea ThomsonInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAffiliationNinjago City CouncilHomeworld/ HomelandNinjagoOccupationCouncilorStatusAliveFirst appearance"Snaketastrophy"Latest appearance"A Lesson in Anger"Voiced byTabitha St. GermainCity Councilwoman Andrea Thomsonis a councilwoman ofNinjago City. WhenDan Vaapitdecided to do a panel discussion afterGayle GossipandVinnywere captured byAspheeraand asked her andMay Robsenabout their thoughts on "Snaketastrophy," she said that thePyro Vipersattack onNinjago Cityis dangerous for their local neighborhoods, and her counterpoint agreed, which pleased her. Andrea attended MayorUlysses Trustable's press conference about the latest invasion by theCrystal army, asking if he had a plan for the "floating island of doom" that hovered above the invaders. When theNew Ninjafailed to stop the Crystal Army, Andrea ran for her life alongside the rest of those in attendance.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: AndrewInformationSpeciesDevonianAffiliationDevoniansHomeworld/ HomelandFirst LandStatusAliveFirst appearance"Between You and Lee"Latest appearance"Under the Light of a Mechanical Moon"Andrewis aDevonianthat lives in theCommunity of Lee. At some point in time, Andrew was found byThe AdministrationfollowingThe Mergeand was sent to theLand of Leeunder the belief that it was his homeland. He appears dancing withColinin a Tango class. While they are turning, Colin bonks his head with a human who was also learning Tango with a partner.
